audit_items.proof_trace: nfp_app_ndo_uninit() contains zero allocations: it only calls nfp_app_from_netdev() (a read-only pointer accessor with no alloc) and then delegates to the app-specific ndo_uninit callback. Because no allocation ever occurs in this function body, the property's precondition is never satisfied and it holds vacuously. The function is also void with no error paths.
